_comment: THE RADIO FACES — each is a pixel faceplate PNG with EMPTY dynamic zones; the code drives them (proto3d/radio_face.gd). type 'analog' = a tuning pointer slides the FM scale ('scale' rect: x0/x1 span, y top, h height, all fractions of the shown face) plus the display text; type 'digital' = display text only ('win' rect), no pointer. The moving/live parts are NEVER baked into the art (same law as the speedo needle). Adding a radio = drop a PNG + a row.
